Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2D00 "PERISCOPEUP-1000-2D00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Periscope Up.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 which: 1. Sets the correct VICII settings 2. Sets the correct border and screen colours as well as background #1, #2 and #3 colours 3. Initialises colour RAM for the loading screen to display correctly 4. Displays the loading screen and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game
